text.title: Testing in JavaScript / TypeScript Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether testing-javascript applies. Root question is a yes/no observable on the incoming task; branches name a concrete observable (`when`) and conclude either with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the project ship via Vite, Next, Remix, or Astro?

branch.when: test target is a React component or hook
test target makes outbound HTTP calls

example.description: When `yes (Vite-family)` holds, the tree concludes `rule:r1` — meaning the methodology applies via that specific rule. The agent should load the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follow it.
